raw_consumer_statement:
Somone hack into my CITI XXXX card account to place XXXX Flex loans in XXXX XXXX ( ~ {$15000.00} ) and on XX/XX/XXXX ( ~ {$2000.00} ). I found these activities on XXXX XXXX and called Citi. Citi place " dispute '' on the XXXX loans and changed my account number. 
I talked to a citi investigator on XXXX XXXX and she was investigating. On XXXX XXXX I found the XXXX XXXX loan was placed in Fraud center. While the XXXX XXXX loan is convered to the money I owed. I called citi again, the investigatyor said she could not find any record that I called on XXXX XXXX and she started a new investigating. Today ( XX/XX/XXXX ), the XXXX XXXX loan is still in the amount I owed, and nothing else happened. 
My understanding is that the XXXX XXXX overlook the XXXX XXXX loan.
